decision: Prototype removed. Do not retry the same-kernel producer/consumer spin-barrier topology for linear_attn.out_proj.

candidate.name: linear_attn.out_proj f32 rotate + transposed W4 GEMV staged keyed
candidate.description: Combine paro_rotate1_f32_to_fp16 staging with the following transposed pack8 W4 GEMV while preserving the FP16 rotated staging point.

focused_correctness.evidence: Synthetic GPU comparison matched rotated FP16 staging and output FP16 bitwise against paro_rotate1_f32_to_fp16 + gemv_awq_pack8_multi_row_transposed_fp16 at rows=4.

real_mtp_smoke.command: PROMPT_TOKENS=$(cat /tmp/quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt); HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_MTP_DRAFT_VOCAB_CAP=32768 HIPENGINE_LINEAR_OUT_ROTATE_GEMV_STAGED=1 PYTHONPATH=. timeout 1800 python3 scripts/mtp_chain_e2e_smoke.py --model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --prompt-tokens "$PROMPT_TOKENS" --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budget 3 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode decode_batched --graph-mode off --json /tmp/hipengine-mtp-linear-out-rotate-gemv-staged-smoke-20260612.json
observations: Process remained running in state R<l.
rocm-smi showed GPU0 at 100% busy, 48% VRAM, and 0% memory activity.
Killing the process returned GPU busy and VRAM usage to idle.

analysis: The focused synthetic shape does not cover the real verifier scheduling hazard. At real B=3 out-proj grid size, consumer GEMV blocks can occupy scheduler slots while producer rotate blocks still need to run, so a global in-kernel spin barrier can deadlock.
next_action: Keep reduced-DAG work focused on scheduling-safe multi-kernel/subgraph designs or true single-kernel designs that do not wait on unscheduled blocks.
